answer: Sentry offers a free Developer plan that includes 5,000 errors and 10,000 transactions per month for a single user [1][2]. This plan is self-serve and does not require a credit card to initiate [2]. However, the free Developer plan does not support pay-as-you-go billing or additional quota purchases; if you reach your usage limits, you must upgrade to a paid Team or Business plan to increase your capacity [3][4]. API access is available to all users, but data ingestion is strictly limited by the quotas defined in your selected plan [5].
